root.description: GDPR-compliant MCP gateway — a persistent knowledge and file pool for Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, Cursor & Codex.
root.ogDescription: A shared memory pool for all your AI clients. EU-hosted, GDPR-compliant.

marketing.title: Coming soon
marketing.description: lokri.io is launching soon. The GDPR-compliant MCP gateway for your AI clients.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters

search.placeholder: Search, jump, or run a command…

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.description: Do you really want to delete this item?

revoke.title: Confirm revocation
revoke.description: Do you really want to revoke this access?

remove.title: Confirm removal
remove.description: Do you really want to remove this item?

leave.title: Confirm leaving
leave.description: Do you really want to leave this area?

disconnect.title: Confirm disconnect
disconnect.description: Do you really want to disconnect this connection?

planDescription.free: To get started. No payment method required.
planDescription.starter: 100 MB of storage — fits regular use.
planDescription.pro: 1 GB — for power users with large file pools.
planDescription.team: Seat-based — 5 GB / 1,000 files / 5,000 notes per member. Billing is currently manual (beta).

common.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.

auth.sessionExpired: Session expired — please sign in again.

session.accountDisabled: Your account is disabled. Contact support.
session.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

storage.providerNameTaken: A provider with this name already exists.
storage.readOnly: This provider is read-only — writes are not allowed.

storageProvider.inUse: Storage provider is still in use and cannot be deleted.

github.invalidToken: GitHub token is invalid or expired.
github.insufficientScope: GitHub token does not have the required permissions.
github.repoNotFound: Repository not found or not accessible.
github.rateLimit: GitHub rate limit reached. Please try again later.

team.createDisabled: Team creation is currently not enabled for you.
team.nameRequired: Team name must not be empty.
team.forbidden: Only owners and admins may do that.
team.alreadyMember: This email is already a member of the team.
team.ownerProtected: The owner cannot be removed or demoted.
team.confirmNameMismatch: The entered name does not match the team name.

invite.invalidToken: Invitation link is invalid or has expired.
invite.emailMismatch: This invitation link belongs to a different email address.

upload.extractFailed: Text extraction failed — the file is stored but not searchable.

search.queryTooShort: Query too short — at least {min} characters.

shared.footer: This email was sent automatically. Replies are not monitored.

verifyEmail.subject: Please confirm your email address
verifyEmail.heading: Welcome to lokri.io
verifyEmail.intro: Thanks for signing up. Please confirm your email address to activate your account.
verifyEmail.fallback: If the button does not work, open this link: {url}

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.heading: Reset password
resetPassword.intro: You asked to reset your password. Click the button to choose a new one. The link expires in one hour.
resetPassword.ignoreHint: If you did not request this, simply ignore this email.

deleteAccount.subject: Confirm account deletion
deleteAccount.heading: Delete account
deleteAccount.intro: To permanently delete your lokri.io account, confirm via the link below. All data (notes, files, spaces, tokens) will be irrecoverably removed.
deleteAccount.warning: If you did not request this, ignore this email — nothing will happen.

changeEmail.subject: Confirm new email address
changeEmail.heading: Email change
changeEmail.intro: You want to change your email address to {newEmail}. Confirm to complete the switch.
changeEmail.warning: If you did not request this, ignore this email.

twoFactorOtp.subject: Your sign-in code for lokri.io
twoFactorOtp.heading: Two-factor code
twoFactorOtp.expiry: The code is valid for {minutes} minutes.

teamInvite.subject: Invitation to {teamName} on lokri.io
teamInvite.heading: You've been invited
teamInvite.intro: {inviterName} invited you to join the team {teamName} as {role}.
teamInvite.expiry: The invitation link is valid until {expiresAt}.
teamInvite.ignoreHint: Not interested? Simply ignore this email — nothing will happen.

ownershipTransferredNotification.subject: You are now the owner of {teamName}
ownershipTransferredNotification.heading: Ownership transferred
ownershipTransferredNotification.intro: {previousOwnerName} has transferred the owner role of {teamName} to you. You can now manage billing settings, invite further members, change roles, and delete the team.
ownershipTransferredNotification.responsibility: As owner, you are responsible for the team's billing and data stewardship. If you do not want to take this on, contact {previousOwnerName} or transfer the role onward.

ownershipTransferredConfirmation.subject: Ownership of {teamName} transferred
ownershipTransferredConfirmation.heading: Ownership transferred
ownershipTransferredConfirmation.intro: You have transferred the owner role of {teamName} to {newOwnerName}. You are now an admin and can continue contributing to the team, but no longer have access to billing or team deletion.
ownershipTransferredConfirmation.reversalHint: If this was a mistake, ask {newOwnerName} to transfer the role back — we cannot undo this automatically.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to lokri.io.
login.inviteHint: Registration is currently closed — <contact>contact us</contact> for an invite.

register.title: Registration closed
register.subtitle: We're not taking new accounts right now. If you've been invited or already have access, just sign in.
register.contactIntro: Still interested? Write to us at <email></email> — we'll reach out when registration opens again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for <email></email>, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox — the link is valid for one hour.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been reset. You can sign in now.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor
twoFactor.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

home.subtitle: MCP gateway for your AI clients.

newNote.label: New note
newNote.description: Markdown or plain text, embedded automatically.

uploadFile.label: Upload file
uploadFile.description: Drag and drop, up to 10 MB per file.

mcpToken.label: MCP token
mcpToken.description: Connect Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, and Cursor.

space.label: Create a space
space.description: Groups notes and files by topic. Optional, but helpful for staying organized.

note.label: First note
note.description: Markdown text, indexed automatically for semantic search.

client.label: Connect AI client
client.description: Generate an MCP token and enter it in Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, or Cursor.

overview.title: Dashboard
overview.subtitle: A quick glance at your content.

search.placeholder: Search, jump, or run a command…

dialog.title: Command palette
dialog.description: Jump to spaces, notes, files, or run actions.

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.subtitle: Thematic groups for notes and files.

empty.title: No spaces yet
empty.body: Spaces bundle notes + files by topic. Create your first one.

createDialog.title: New space
createDialog.description: Give the space a name and optionally pick a storage provider.
createDialog.name: Name

reindex.confirm: Reindex all files in this space? Existing embeddings will be replaced. This may take several minutes depending on size.

empty.internal: No files yet — drop them here or upload via the Files page.
empty.external: This path has no visible objects — drop files here to upload them into the bucket.
empty.readOnly: This path has no visible objects (source is read-only).

dropzone.title: Drop files here to upload
dropzone.hintExternal: They land in the connected bucket and are indexed immediately.
dropzone.hintInternal: Stored in this space and indexed immediately.

upload.success: {count, plural, one {# file uploaded.} other {# files uploaded.}}
upload.noValidFiles: No valid files (folders are not supported).
upload.busy: Wait until the current upload finishes.

empty.title: No notes yet
empty.body: Notes are automatically embedded and searchable via MCP. Write your first one.

files.title: Files
files.subtitle: Files — local or from connected storage providers.

empty.title: No files yet
empty.body: Your uploads land here. Text is extracted and made searchable.

general.languageDescription: Language of the web UI. Saved in a cookie and on your profile.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.subtitle: Connect Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, Cursor, or other MCP clients to your lokri account.

tokens.title: Legacy bearer tokens
tokens.description: Static tokens for scripts and CLI integrations. Modern clients use OAuth instead (see below).
tokens.empty: No tokens yet. Create one for your first client.
tokens.revokeConfirm: Revoke token "{name}"? Clients will lose access immediately.

create.title: New MCP token
create.subtitle: Name the token and decide what access the client should have.
create.scopeTypePersonalHint: Revoked when you leave the team.
create.scopeTypeNote: Personal tokens are revoked when you leave the team. Team-wide tokens persist.
create.createdSubtitle: Copy the token now — it will not be shown again.
create.oneTimeWarning: After closing this dialog the token cannot be shown again. Save it in your AI client configuration or a password manager.
create.name: Name
create.scopeEmpty: You have no spaces yet. Create one first to assign it here.
create.readOnlyHint: The client can read and search but cannot create, change, or delete anything.

errors.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one space — or pick "all spaces".

instructions.title: Set up a client
instructions.subtitle: Copy & paste snippets for Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, Cursor.

storage.title: Storage
storage.subtitle: Attach your own S3 buckets or GitHub repos.

internal.name: lokri-managed (Vercel Blob)
internal.description: Default for all uploads without a space-specific assignment. Always available, not deletable.

list.empty: No external providers yet. Create one, then you can assign it to individual spaces.

add.title: New storage provider
add.subtitle: S3-compatible bucket or a GitHub repo (read-only). We test the connection before saving — invalid credentials are not persisted.
add.encryptionNote: Access credentials are AES-256-GCM encrypted in the DB and never returned in plain text.
add.githubHelp: Optional for public repos — without a token, GitHub's IP rate limit applies (60 req/h). For private repos use a {patLink} with the "Contents: Read" scope on the repo.

embeddingKey.title: Own embedding API key (BYOK)
embeddingKey.subtitle: Instead of routing through the Vercel AI Gateway, every embedding request hits your own OpenAI account directly. No markup on our side, full audit trail on yours. Without a key, the default gateway route is used.
embeddingKey.activeHint: Every embedding request now goes directly to api.openai.com — the Vercel AI Gateway is bypassed.
embeddingKey.inactive: No key configured — gateway fallback active
embeddingKey.inactiveHint: Embeddings are currently routed through the Vercel AI Gateway. Add your own key below to bypass gateway costs or keep a clean audit trail in your OpenAI account.
embeddingKey.modelHint: Both models emit 1536-dim vectors — required by our pgvector column.
embeddingKey.apiKeyHint: The key is AES-256-GCM encrypted in the DB and never returned in plain text. We test the connection before saving — invalid keys are not persisted.
embeddingKey.removeConfirm: Really remove the key? Embeddings will fall back to the Vercel AI Gateway.
embeddingKey.successSave: Key saved — embeddings now run via your account.

modelSwitchWarning.title: Model-switch warning
modelSwitchWarning.body: Switching from {modelA} to {modelB} leaves existing vectors in an incompatible embedding space — new queries will search a different space than old chunks. For clean operation, {reindexLabel} every space once after a model switch.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Members, roles, and settings for this team.

overview.seatsUsed: {count, plural, one {# seat used} other {# seats used}}
overview.dangerDescription: The team and all its data will be permanently deleted.

delete.title: Delete team {name}
delete.intro: This removes all members, spaces, notes, files, and tokens of this team. The action cannot be undone.
delete.mismatch: The entered name does not match.

members.title: Members
members.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from the team? Personal tokens for this member will be revoked.
members.cannotDemoteOwner: The sole owner cannot be demoted.

transferOwnership.dialogBody: You are transferring the owner role to {name}. After the transfer you will be an admin and can no longer manage billing or delete the team. Continue?

errors.notAdmin: The target user must be promoted to admin first.
errors.selfTransfer: You cannot transfer ownership to yourself.
errors.notOwner: Only the current owner can transfer ownership.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.description: Send an email invitation. The recipient accepts via a magic link (valid for 7 days).

errors.alreadyMember: This email is already a member of the team.
errors.alreadyInvited: There is already an open invitation for this email.

locale.title: Language
locale.description: Language of the web UI and our emails.
locale.label: Select language

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Extra protection via a TOTP app (1Password, Authy, Google Authenticator).

export.title: Export
export.description: Download a complete export of your data (JSON + files as ZIP).

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.deleteConfirm: Really delete your account? This cannot be undone. All notes, files, tokens, and spaces will be removed.
dangerZone.deleteInitiated: Confirmation email on the way. Click the link to finalize the deletion.

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Pick a plan that fits you. One-time payment via PayPal.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.empty: No invoices yet — you're on the Free plan.

success.title: Payment successful
success.body: Your plan is active. The invoice is available in your billing documents.

errors.noApproveUrl: No approval URL received from PayPal.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.tagline: The GDPR-compliant MCP gateway for your AI clients.

createDialog.title: New team
createDialog.description: Give the team a name. You can invite members after creation.
createDialog.name: Team name

errors.disabled: Team creation is not enabled for your account.

accept.title: Invitation to {teamName}
accept.subtitle: {inviterName} invited you as {role}.
accept.needsLogin: Sign in or register to accept this invitation.

errors.invalidToken: This invitation link is invalid or already accepted.
errors.expired: This invitation link has expired. Ask for a new one.
errors.emailMismatch: This invitation belongs to a different email address. Sign in with the invited address or sign out.
errors.alreadyMember: You're already a member of this team.
errors.generic: The invitation could not be accepted.
